title: Father Dies, Daughter Injured in Motorcycle-Bus Collision in Isabela | Bombo Radyo Philippines
snippet: A tragic accident in Malasin, San Mateo, Isabela claimed the life of a 55-year-old man, while his 23-year-old daughter sustained injuries after their motorcycle crashed into a passenger bus.
location: Barangay Malasin, San Mateo, Isabela, Philippines
display_name: Malasin Elementary School, Alicia-San Mateo Road, San Mateo, Isabela, Cagayan Valley, Philippines

title: 4 Injured as Van Crashes Into Parked Truck in Isabela | Bombo Radyo Philippines
snippet: Van crashes into parked truck in Isabela, leaving four individuals injured in a collision that occurred along the National Highway in Purok Villanueva, Barangay Antonino, Alicia, Isabela.
display_name: Antonino, Alicia, Isabela, Cagayan Valley, 3306, Philippines

title: Three Killed, Three Hurt in Multiple Motorcycle Crash
snippet: Three people died, while three others sustained injuries in a collision involving three motorcycles in Victoria, Mallig, Isabela.
